criteria.label: Start an MLflow run and log one param, one metric with step, and one artifact.
criteria.example: Script prints run_id; mlruns/<exp>/<run>/metrics shows val_auc at step=0; artifacts folder contains report.json.

criteria.label: Start a W&B run with config and log two metrics across three steps.
criteria.example: Project dashboard shows train_loss and val_auc curves over steps 0–2; Config tab lists learning_rate and seed.

criteria.label: Explain param vs metric logging and give one example of each.
criteria.example: Param: seed=42 (static). Metric: val_f1=0.84 at epoch=5 (changes over time). Wrong: logging lr as a metric every epoch.

criteria.label: Compare two runs programmatically or describe the MLflow UI compare steps.
criteria.example: MlflowClient.search_runs order_by metrics.val_auc DESC returns top run IDs with learning_rate param visible.

criteria.label: List four params to log for reproducible run comparison and why.
criteria.example: seed, git_commit, data_version, val_fraction — so a higher val_auc is not attributed to a different split or code.
